title: SWP Client Discovery Config
description: JSON config for client discovery of SWP servers (like MCP). Local FSMs are supplied programmatically, not in this config.

servers.description: List of SWP servers the client can connect to.

id.description: Optional id for this server (e.g. 'legal-review'). Defaults to base_url if omitted.

base_url.description: Base URL of the SWP server (e.g. https://api.example.com/swp).
